metadata.description: Agent-native dev task board — investigate needs into well-specified tasks, execute them end-to-end, verify acceptance criteria. Pocock's frontier pattern with spec/slug/dependency fields and scope de-enum.

plugins.name: devtask
plugins.description: Agent-native dev task board with 3 skills: devtask-plan (investigate needs into well-specified tasks), devtask-doit (execute tasks end-to-end), devtask-verify (verify acceptance criteria against real code).
